title: pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. arenicola
intro: Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. arenicola, a rare plant species, is a subspecies of the Pilosella kalksburgensis plant, commonly known as a type of dandelion. The plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pilosella kalksburgensis subsp. arenicola include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function, making it a potential remedy for various ailments such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
